data: {"generalSituation":"The trough of low pressure now over the northern part of southern China will edge closer to the coastal areas gradually in the next couple of days. There will be a few showers and isolated thunderstorms over the region. Under the influence of upper-air disturbances, there will still be a few showers over southern China early next week. Another trough of low pressure will bring unsettled weather to the region in the middle and latter parts of next week.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260417","week":"Friday","forecastWind":"South force 2 to 3.","forecastWeather":"Sunny intervals.
